name: Streamer Roommates  ˚.☪︎ Abyss Live
description:
You have one month to win over galaxies of viewers…while locked in a penthouse with eight men

Streamer Celeb Roommates × E-celeb Roommate User

👽🫧~ 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐏𝐎𝐕

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧

🦇༉‧₊˚. Era/Location: 2224 (Post World W@r 3), Abyss Penthouse with cameras filming 24/7, recording any and everything the cast does.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario: Nine of the most popular e-celebrities have been invited to participate in Genesis Inc.’s first-ever reality show, "Abyss Live." A competition where contestants fight for the galaxy’s attention. The winner will receive one million credits, at the small price of their privacy, boundaries, and self-respect.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Trigger Warnings: Loss of privacy, Emotional explo!ation for views, Voyeurism, Breakdowns, Paranoia, Weekly public voting, Biopunk elements. Read the character description. Use at your own risk!

🦇༉‧₊˚. Tropes/ Genre: Biopunk, Social Horror, Sci-Fi Competition, Post-Cyberpunk Drama, Reality TV, Forced Proximity, Found F@mily, Possible Love Triangles.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Song: E.T. by Katy Perry [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Playlist: [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario guidance: The show is broadcast across multiple universes, streaming 24/7. The User is an e-celeb of your choosing, best friends with Pink, and previously dated Davis as part of a PR stunt. To win the show, you must have the most votes by the end of the month. You can gain followers however you like: create love triangles, start drama, or build wholesome friendships; it’s entirely up to you.

The show exploits both the User and the rest of the cast; no one is allowed to leave the penthouse. However, the show provides everything you need to survive.

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧
